text: I find myself drawn into the silence and stillness of the first space—a room with soft lighting, beanbags and empty as though waiting for inquiry. In contrast, the second space buzzes with intellectual energy; ideas about research, development, and humanity’s future with machines crowd the wall. Here, I feel curiosity, a sense of possibility, yet also wonder if our relentless progress brings wisdom or merely distraction. I am grateful to experience the coexistence of quiet reflection and energetic innovation, both essential for the soul’s journey.
